title: Andrew Sessler
body: Andrew Marienhoff Sessler (December 11, 1928 – April 17, 2014) was an American physicist, academic at University of California, Berkeley, former director of the Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory (1973–1980), humanitarian and former president (1998) of the American Physical Society.
categories: Members of the United States National Academy of Sciences
Presidents of the American Physical Society
